notes: Phase A: 459 batters, 548 pitchers, 245 injuries scraped.

Player news: only 10 items captured (down from 49 yesterday). CBS removed page-N pagination from /fantasy/baseball/players/news/ — '/?page=2' now returns same content as page 1, and pages 2-5 path-style 404s. Static HTML only exposes 10 items (more loaded via JS / 'Show more'). Consider adding a JS-rendered scrape via Claude-in-Chrome if more news items are needed.

User-reported: position eligibilities were stale (last updated 4/23). Rebuilt cbs_positions.json from CURRENT roster pages — corrected 47 stale entries (e.g. DH→U for Yordan Alvarez/Schwarber, Bo Bichette SS→3B,SS, Brett Baty 3B→1B,2B,3B,RF, Brendan Donovan 2B→2B,3B, etc.) and added 137 newly tracked players. cbs_positions.json is no longer a manually curated file — it's now refreshed daily from /teams/{1..12} roster scrapes.
Transactions: 248 rows scraped via /transactions?print_rows=9999. Action types observed: Activated, Added, Added off Waivers, Dropped, Moved to IR, Traded from <Team>. All known.
Rosters: 12 teams, 394 players total (29-36 each). cbs_rosters.json overwritten.

Period 3 in progress (2026-04-27 to 2026-05-10). Current matchup: Okamotomami 6.0 vs A Pete Crow-Armstrong Looked at Me 10.0 (unchanged from yesterday's snapshot — score moves slowly in head-to-head categories format). Standings updated: 2-0 record for Okamotomami.
